creator: web@umich.edu
text:
Using portmaster to build/install textproc/reflex from source in /usr/ports on 14.2-STABLE running on amd64 using the GENERIC kernel.

The compilation and links succeeds just fine, but during the installation phase this error is produced:

====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===>  Installing for reflex-20241231
===>  Checking if reflex is already installed
===>   Registering installation for reflex-20241231
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/textproc/reflex/work/stage/usr/local/share/man/man1/reflex++.1.gz:No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/textproc/reflex

===>>> Installation of reflex-20241231 (textproc/reflex) failed
===>>> Aborting update

So I checked, and sure enough that file is not found in that directory.
I have sent an email to the maintainer "sunpoet@FreeBSD.org" but have received not response at the time of creating this bug report.

If anyone has any suggestions, I would appreciate that.  Have a great day!

.
